title: Junior Business Development Manager at Ramky Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Ramky Group
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!
